components.value: V, S, M (a bone from an undead creature)

area.value: one living creature per three levels, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

duration.value: 1 round/level or 1 round; see text for cause fear

description.value: This spell functions like cause fear, except that it causes all targeted creatures of less than 6 HD to become frightened.
